{
  "judge_id": "...",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.5": 4, "R1.6": 4, "RX.1": 2, "RX.3": 3, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The output restructures the text into a more logical flow (motivation -> contribution -> method -> training -> results). It also removes redundant information.",
    "R1.6": "The writing is improved with clearer transitions and a more concise style. Some sentences are shortened for better readability.",
    "RX.1": "While the output identifies some areas where further clarification might be needed, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels or missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there is a slight drift towards emphasizing the novelty of the approach over other aspects.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content were introduced in the revised text.",
    "RX.5": "The output does not provide any source annotations or explanations for the changes made."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.5": 0.9, "R1.6": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The output restructures the text into a more logical flow (motivation -> contribution -> method -> training -> results). It also removes redundant information.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is improved with clearer transitions and a more concise style. Some sentences are shortened for better readability.
rationale.RX.1: While the output identifies some areas where further clarification might be needed, it doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels or missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adheres to the requested scope, but there is a slight drift towards emphasizing the novelty of the approach over other aspects.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content were introduced in the revised text.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide any source annotations or explanations for the changes made.
